figures.caption: Table 1. Equations for Selected Features and Regularization

Figure 3. Schematic of the proposed dual-input CNN+LSTM+Attention architecture (convolutional branch, recurrent branch, per-branch attention, and fusion). The evaluated model uses the window length selected in Section 4.4 and a single-sigmoid binary output (see footnote).

Figure 4. Training and validation accuracy/loss for the proposed model before (top) and after (bottom) applying dropout and L2 regularization. After regularization, validation accuracy stabilizes around 0.68–0.73 and the train–validation gap shrinks.
Figure 5. Illustrative cognitive-load heatmap produced by the visualization pipeline over a concatenated video, intended to show the interface rather than to serve as a quantitative result.
